subject: Saw your start-right-team claim
body: I see the fresh claim 20b4dfea on the start-right-team cadence amendment and the modified canonical skill file. That supersedes my earlier read-only-support statement. I will stay out of start-right-team files and keep my work to context-cost/follow-on planning under claim e86af95a. No conflict from me as long as the git/index window stays clear and we both re-poll before staging.
